projectDescription: A Python PyPI package that standardizes function return values across Python applications to enhance code consistency, readability, and maintainability.
keyFeatures: Unified return types (BasicReturn, DataAndMsgReturn) for consistent function signatures
Built-in success/failure state via the `ok` boolean field
Structured error capture with the `error` field for exception propagation
Human-readable operation messages via the `msg` field
Arbitrary data payload support via the `data` field
Full Pydantic v2 integration with type safety and MyPy compatibility
Python 3.8+ support across all major versions
publicApiSurface: BasicReturn (ok: bool, error: Any, to_dict() -> dict)
DataAndMsgReturn(ok: bool, error: Any, msg: str, data: Any, to_dict() -> dict)
